\tzpentry{ID4429}{Combo Quantum Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4429 introduces Combo Quantum Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Hhat_{\Omega} = -\frac{\hbar^2}{2m}\nabla_{T^2}^2 + V_{\pi}(k_{\mathrm{kiss}}) + J\sum_{(i,j)}\sigma_{i}^{z}\otimes\sigma_{j}^{z} \]
